since_last: 79% of 89 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +4.59%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 79% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +1.18% · BTC +1.41% · Gold -1.21% · Nasdaq100 +2.25%. 79% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +4.59%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +4.59%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -0.44%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: HON is the standout at -50.95%
cards.body: Leaders: KLAC +11.63%, AMAT +10.57%, PANW +8.97%, TSLA +8.43%, LRCX +8.23%. Laggards: HON -50.95%, SMCI -8.16%, SYNA -2.98%, TLN -1.18%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +7.51% at $164.73
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +7.51% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
